properties.Test Case: Import into a new book. Verify that your audio is still aligned to the segments you made.
properties.Steps: --          Import into a new book. Verify that your audio is still aligned to the segments you made.

properties.Test Case: Close the Talking Book tool. The segments should disappear.
properties.Steps: --          Close the Talking Book tool. The segments should disappear.

properties.Test Case: Inline Formatting: Create a new page, enter some text. Select some words and give them color. Other words should have italics, etc. Everthing that we let you do with selected text. For some segment of text, apply all of that formatting to the same segment. Record the text. Now export the book and import into a blank book. -- Verify that the text has all the same formatting in Excel
properties.Steps:
Inline Formatting: Create a new page, enter some text. Select some words and give them color. Other words should have italics, etc. Everthing that we let you do with selected text. For some segment of text, apply all of that formatting to the same segment. Record the text.
Now export the book and import into a blank book.
--           Verify that the text has all the same formatting in Excel

properties.Test Case: Now import into a blank book. Verify that all of the formatting was round-tripped correctly.
properties.Steps: --           Now import into a blank book. Verify that all of the formatting was round-tripped correctly.

properties.Test Case: Export a book. Remove some pages from the spreadsheet. Now import back onto the original book and verify that they have been removed from the spreadsheet
properties.Steps: Export a book. Remove some pages from the spreadsheet. Now import back onto the original book and verify that they have been removed from the spreadsheet
